title: lathyrus libani
intro: Lathyrus libani, also known as the Syrian pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. Lathyrus libani is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and its seeds are also used in traditional medicine, often dried or crushed for their extract.
